name: restore-image
description: Use FLUX Kontext to restore, fix scratches and damage, and colorize old photos

input_image.description: Image to restore. Must be jpeg, png, gif, or webp.
input_image.title: Input Image

output_format.description: Output format for the generated image
output_format.title: output_format

safety_tolerance.description: Safety tolerance, 0 is most strict and 2 is most permissive. 2 is currently the maximum allowed.
safety_tolerance.title: Safety Tolerance

seed.description: Random seed. Set for reproducible generation
seed.title: Seed
